name: git
description: Git safety net for Claude — a PreToolUse guard that blocks destructive/remote/history ops (push, pull, amend, rebase, reset --hard, --no-verify, and discards of uncommitted work) — plus a test-first hotfix skill (failing test → minimal fix → cherry-pick both ways, remotes handed to the user). Commit message style is a separate opt-in: the commit plugin.
